subject: [PATCH v5 31/36] mm: add NODE_PRIVATE_CAP_LTPIN for private node folio pinning

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch adds the capability to opt-in private nodes for long-term GUP pinning, allowing them to be pinned like ordinary memory or migrated and pinned if in a movable zone. The change introduces a new flag NODE_PRIVATE_CAP_LTPIN and modifies existing functions to check for this capability. This enables more flexible handling of private node folios and allows for better utilization of system resources.
